result.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: a / sqrt(a^2 + a0^2)
JUSTIFICATION: The ratio of the flat-space Unruh temperature to the de Sitter-modified Unruh temperature follows the MOND interpolation function mu(x) = x / sqrt(x^2 + 1), where x = a/a0, which simplifies to the ratio of the acceleration to the effective acceleration a_eff = sqrt(a^2 + a0^2).
